_publications._publicationTitle: Mouse low-grade gliomas contain cancer stem cells with unique molecular and functional properties.

_contextSnippet: The frequency of this stem cell population in the murine optic gliomas ranged from 0.06% to 0.28% (0.15 +/− 0.11%; n=3), determined using a primary sphere formation assay
details: Neurosphere formation frequency from optic nerve cultures ranged from 0.06% to 0.28% (0.15 +/− 0.11%; n=3)
